item.title: MDN722 - Çokdeğişkenli Jeoistatistik
item.description: Merhaba arkadaşlar, “MDN722 - Çokdeğişkenli Jeoistatistik” dersini Pazartesi günü (16 Kasım 2020) saat 10:00’da Zoom üzerinden gerçekleştireceğiz. Zoom linkini, Fen Bilimleri Enstitüsü’ne kayıtlı e-postanıza göndereceğim. Dear all, “MDN722 - Multivariate Geostatistics” lecture will be on November 16, 2020 at 10h00 via Zoom. I will send Zoom link to your e-mails that you are registered at Graduate School of Science and Engineering. ☀️ GERTUNC ⚒

item.title: Announcement about MAD213 Basic Statistics on October 30
item.description: 📢 MAD213 - Basic Statistics lecture on October 30, 2020 is postponed to November 6, 2020. ☀️ GERTUNC 📊

item.description: Dear all, Lecture notes are available here. Good luck, ☀️ GERTUNC ⚒

item.title: MAD213 Basic Statistics, Week 03
item.description: Date Topic October 7 Introduction October 23 Measures of location and dispersion (Lecture slides link) ☀️ GERTUNC 📊

item.title: MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 02
item.description: Date Topic October 7 Introduction October 8 Rocks, minerals and mineral inventory evaluation October 14 Mining Method Selection (Lecture slides link) Dear all, These are the videos for U/G productions. Room-and-pillar mining: Longwall mining: Block caving: Sublevel caving: ☀️ GERTUNC ⚒

item.title: MAD213 Basic Statistics, Week 01
item.description: Date Topic October 9 Introduction Dear all, Textbook recommendation for the MAD213 are as follows: Online Statistics Education: An Interactive Multimedia Course of Study, Developed by Rice University , University of Houston Clear Lake, and Tufts University. [pdf link] (In lecture, I will refer this open source pdf as “Online Statistics pdf”) Pierre Lafaye de Micheaux, Rémy Drouilhet, Benoit Liquet, 2013, “The R Software Fundamentals of Programming and Statistical Analysis”, Springer John Chambers, 2008, “Software for Data Analysis”, Jacek M.

item.title: MAD213 Weekly Schedule
item.description: Dear all, I have set zoom meeting link for MAD213. Check out its detail here Below, you can find detailed weekly schedule of MAD213. ☀️ GERTUNC 📊 Date Topic October 9 Introduction October 16 Basic definitions and concepts October 23 Measures of location and dispersion October 30 Representing data graphically November 6 Distributions November 13 t tests November 20 Midterm 1 November 27 ANOVA December 4 Regression December 11 Correlation December 18 Confidence intervals December 25 Chi square tests January 1 Public Holiday: New Year January 8 Midterm 2

item.title: MAD345 Mining II(P), Week 01
item.description: Date Topic October 7 Introduction October 8 Rocks, minerals and mineral inventory evaluation (Lecture slides link) Dear all, Today’s topic is an introductory for this terms MAD345 Mining II (Underground Part). We have covered Prospecting, Exploration & Site Investigations in mining. Also, resource and reserve estimation and qualified person definitions are given.

item.title: MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 01
item.description: Date Topic October 7 Introduction Dear all, Textbooks for the MAD345 are as follows: Ratan Tatiya, 2005, “Surface and Underground Excavations: Methods, Techniques and Equipment”, Taylor & Francis Group, LLC Peter Darling (Ed.), 2011, “SME Mining Engineering Handbook, Third Edition”, Society for Mining, Metallurgy, and Exploration (US) Galvin, J.M., 2016, “Ground Engineering : Principles and Practices for Underground Coal Mining”, Springer See you tomorrow via Zoom!

item.title: MAD345 Weekly Schedule (Underground Part)
item.description: Dear all, I have set zoom meeting link for MAD345. Check out its detail here Below, you can find detailed weekly schedule of MAD345 for underground mining part ☀️ GERTUNC ⚒ Date Topic October 7 Introduction October 8 Rocks, minerals and mineral inventory evaluation October 14 Mining Method Selection October 15 Ground Mechanics October 21 Supports October 22 Drilling October 28 Underground Development October 29 Explosives and blasting November 4 Underground Extraction November 5 Transportation – Haulage And Hoisting November 11 Sustainable Development November 12 Planning for mine closure November 18 Midterm 1

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Dear all, This blog is created for the Hacettepe University Mining Engineering Fall 2020-2021 lectures notes' repository given by me. You can navigate through the “Tags” that are attached to each post in corresponding dates for upcoming lectures. Good Luck! GERTUNC
